introSection: Mariehønen is a steel kiddie roller coaster at Bakken in Klampenborg, Hovedstaden, Denmark.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Red and blue track and black supports.

fullText:
Mariehønen is a steel kiddie roller coaster at Bakken in Klampenborg, Hovedstaden, Denmark.



Red and blue track and black supports.
